title: alsine campestris
intro: Alsine campestris, also known as field chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alsine campestris include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and minor cuts. Alsine campestris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
